flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Malone University fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (51.8% → 36.6%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Malone University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (777 vs 979).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Malone University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.4k → $37.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Malone University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.4k → $37.2k).
